title: CH65 4HB, Essar Oil (UK) Limited: Environmental permit variation, draft decision advertisement - EPR/FP3139FN
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on the updating of a permit for an installation where a derogation under Article 15(4) of the Industrial Emissions Directive is proposed.  These notices explain:  the Environment Agency’s proposed decision and the reasons and considerations on which it’s based this "
